description: Sprint velocity is below target (70%) and milestone is delayed by 7 days, primarily due to resource constraints (developers on leave, partial QA allocation, and skill gap for Third-party Payer API), compounded by external API delays. This threatens timely completion of the Third-party Integration milestone.
mitigation: Re-prioritize backlog, secure SME support for API, increase QA allocation, escalate API delays with vendor, and adjust milestone plan to add contingency buffer.

description: Critical and high-severity defects are trending upward (20% increase), with 3 Sev1 and 10 Sev2 open defects, including incorrect payment calculation and eligibility validation issues. Defect leakage to UAT and high concentration in the Third-party Integration module indicate systemic quality issues.
mitigation: Initiate root cause analysis, increase test coverage for Third-party Integration, implement defect triage, and focus QA on high-risk modules.

description: Third-party Payer API is experiencing response delays and inconsistent data, while internal dependencies (infra downtime and pending business clarifications) are impeding progress. These systemic issues increase the risk of delivery slippage and rework.
mitigation: Set up regular syncs with API provider, escalate issues to vendor management, expedite business rule clarifications, and work with infra team to improve environment stability.

description: Batch jobs are failing intermittently during night runs, and manual intervention is required for claim reprocessing. Test environment availability is delayed by 2 days, hindering timely QA and increasing the risk of undiscovered defects.
mitigation: Automate batch job monitoring and alerting, investigate and resolve root causes of failures, streamline manual processes, and prioritize test environment stability.

description: HIPAA compliance validation is pending for the new API, and data masking is not fully implemented in lower environments. This exposes the project to regulatory and data privacy risks, including potential PHI/PII leakage.
mitigation: Accelerate HIPAA validation, complete data masking in all environments, perform compliance gap assessment, and enforce RBAC/ABAC for sensitive data.
